heading: Cell Discovery
fact: Robert Hooke discovered cells in cork in 1665. Anton van Leeuwenhoek first observed living cells in 1674.

heading: Cell Theory
fact: Formulated by Schleiden and Schwann (1839). Rudolf Virchow added 'Omnis cellula e cellula' (all cells arise from pre-existing cells) in 1855.

heading: Smallest & Largest
fact: Smallest known cell: Mycoplasma gallisepticum (PPLO). Largest known cell: Ostrich egg. Longest human cell: Neuron.

heading: Powerhouse & Suicide Bags
fact: Mitochondria = Powerhouse of Cell. Lysosome = Suicidal Bag. Ribosome = Protein Factory. Golgi = Traffic Controller.
